name: EntraIDConnector
description: Connects to Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) via the Microsoft Graph API for identity and access management: users, groups, applications, service principals, directory roles, audit logs, and sign-in logs. Uses the OAuth2 client-credentials grant against a tenant-scoped token endpoint.

install_fields.label: Tenant ID
install_fields.help: Your Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID (GUID) — from Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Overview

install_fields.label: Application (Client) ID
install_fields.help: From Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Application (client) ID

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Microsoft Entra ID client secret
install_fields.help: From App registrations → Certificates & secrets → Client secrets

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Scope
install_fields.help: Microsoft Graph scope. Use the default (.default) for client-credentials apps so consented application permissions are honored.

install_fields.label: Microsoft Graph Base URL
install_fields.help: Microsoft Graph API base URL. Override only when targeting national cloud endpoints (US Gov, China, Germany).

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Microsoft Graph requests per minute. Graph throttles per-app and per-tenant; 240 is a safe default for most workloads.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates required config (tenant_id, client_id, client_secret) and marks the connector as installed.

apis.name: Authenticate (Client Credentials)
apis.description: Mints a Microsoft Graph access token via the OAuth2 client-credentials grant against the tenant-scoped token endpoint.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Microsoft Graph connectivity by fetching the tenant's /organization resource.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Lists directory users with optional $filter, $search, $orderby, $select, and $top.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: Fetches a single user by id or userPrincipalName.

apis.name: Create User
apis.description: Creates a new directory user with passwordProfile.

apis.name: Update User
apis.description: PATCHes arbitrary fields on a user.

apis.name: Delete User
apis.description: Deletes a user.

apis.name: Reset User Password
apis.description: Administratively resets a user's password via PATCH on passwordProfile.

apis.name: List Groups
apis.description: Lists directory groups.

apis.name: Get Group
apis.description: Fetches a single group by id.

apis.name: Create Group
apis.description: Creates a new directory group.

apis.name: List Group Members
apis.description: Lists members of a group.

apis.name: Add Group Member
apis.description: Adds a user to a group via POST /groups/{id}/members/$ref with @odata.id payload.

apis.name: Remove Group Member
apis.description: Removes a user from a group via DELETE /groups/{gid}/members/{uid}/$ref.

apis.name: List Applications
apis.description: Lists app registrations in the tenant.

apis.name: List Service Principals
apis.description: Lists service principals in the tenant.

apis.name: List Directory Roles
apis.description: Lists activated directory roles in the tenant.

apis.name: List Directory Audit Logs
apis.description: Lists directory audit log entries.

apis.name: List Sign-In Logs
apis.description: Lists Entra ID sign-in log entries.
